---
title: "Teaching"
title-block-banner: false
---

<!--This is my personal clarity, please delete or replace with your own clarity-->
{{< include /files/includes/_msclarity.qmd >}}

## Correlational statistics

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
[![](https://2024--correlacional.netlify.app/files/logo-correlacional.png)](https://2024--correlacional.netlify.app/)

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}

I served as co-instructor for the undergraduate course Correlational Statistics in the Sociology program at the University of Chile, together with Juan Carlos Castillo. My role included preparing lectures and teaching materials, leading lectures and R-based practical sessions, designing and grading evaluations, and coordinating teaching activities and student support during the course.

:::

:::


## Descriptive statistics

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
[![](https://descriptiva-facso.netlify.app/files/img/logo.png)](https://descriptiva-facso.netlify.app/)

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-10}

I served as co-instructor for the undergraduate course Descriptive Statistics in the Sociology program at the University of Chile, together with Rodrigo Asún. My role included preparing lectures and teaching materials, leading lectures and R-based practical sessions, designing and grading evaluations, and coordinating teaching activities and student support during the course.

:::

:::
